description: NinjaTrader 8 is open on the Windows desktop with the Control Center visible. Real daily OHLCV data for SPY (S&P 500 ETF) from January 2023 to December 2024 is available in the database. A swing trader needs a multi-timeframe analysis workspace setup for SPY. Create three separate chart windows for SPY: a Daily chart with a 14-period RSI indicator, a Weekly chart with a MACD indicator (12, 26, 9), and a Monthly chart with a 10-period SMA indicator. All three charts must be open simultaneously. Save the workspace to ensure the configuration is persisted. Window arrangement is not required.
